ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team name */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Home team points */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Away team points */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_1" TEXT /* Referee 1 name */,
  "referee_2" TEXT /* Referee 2 name */,
  "referee_3" TEXT /* Referee 3 name */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game went into overtime */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player is currently injured */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the shot was taken in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the shot */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the shot was taken in */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot taken (e.g., Pullup Jump Shot, Tip Dunk Shot) */,
  "location_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the shot location */,
  "location_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the shot location */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the shot (e.g., SCORED, MISSED) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored from the shot */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance from the basket in feet */,
  "assisted_by_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted the shot */,
  "defender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defender closest to the shooter */,
  "shot_difficulty" TEXT /* Rating of the shot difficulty (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_assisted_by_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("assisted_by_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_defender_id FOREIGN KEY ("defender_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play occurred in */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the play */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event that occurred during the play (e.g., shot, rebound, foul) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that the play occurred on */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the play occurred */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Home team score at the time of the play */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Away team score at the time of the play */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., offense, defense, timeout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the game is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time the game is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled game (e.g., scheduled, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
